AUTOMATION.description: Full PC control: mouse, keyboard, and window management. Use with WEBCAM.desktop_screenshot for a see-and-act loop.

commands.get_screen_size: Returns the screen resolution (width x height).
commands.click_text: Find text on screen using OCR and click it.
commands.scroll: Scroll wheel at (x, y) — positive=up, negative=down.
commands.drag: Click-and-drag from one position to another.
commands.type_text: Simulate keyboard typing of a text string.
commands.press_key: Press and release a single key (enter, esc, f5...).
commands.focus_window: Bring a window to foreground by title.
commands.get_browser_tabs: List all open browser tabs via Windows Accessibility API. Use before focus_browser_tab.
commands.focus_browser_tab: Click a browser tab by title fragment (no coordinates needed).
commands.read_window_controls: Read the UI control tree of any application window.

AUTOMATION.routing_instructions: VISION/AUTOMATION SYNERGY: You DO have 'eyes'! You can interact with the user's screen. When asked to click on something, FIRST call WEBCAM__desktop_screenshot to perceive the screen. THEN, instead of guessing (x, y) coordinates, use AUTOMATION__click_text to deterministically find and click labeled buttons, tabs, or menus. ATTENTION: For browser-specific tasks (searching, reading web content, or switching tabs in a browser), PREFER the BROWSER plugin if it's enabled in CDP Mode. Only use AUTOMATION for native desktop apps or if BROWSER tools fail.

BROWSER.description: Hecos AI-controlled Playwright browser. Navigate, read DOM, click elements and fill forms without vision or coordinate guessing.

commands.open_url: Navigate the browser to a URL.
commands.go_back: Navigate back to the previous page.
commands.get_page_text: Read all visible text from the current page.
commands.get_links: List all hyperlinks on the page.
commands.click_element: Click an element by visible text or aria-label.
commands.type_in_field: Fill a form field by label/placeholder and optionally press Enter.
commands.scroll: Scroll the page up or down.
commands.press_key: Press a keyboard key in the browser.
commands.run_js: Execute JavaScript code on the page.
commands.screenshot: Take a viewport screenshot for vision analysis.
commands.list_tabs: List all open tabs in the browser (useful for CDP mode).
commands.switch_tab: Switch focus to a specific tab by its ID.
commands.new_tab: Open a new tab and navigate to a URL.

BROWSER.routing_instructions: BROWSER CONTROL DECISION TREE — Follow these steps in order: (1) ALWAYS start with BROWSER__list_tabs. (2) If it returns a list of tabs → you are in CDP mode. Use BROWSER__switch_tab(index) to go to the right tab, then use BROWSER page tools (get_page_text, click_element, type_in_field). (3) If list_tabs returns 'CDP connection is not active' → Chrome was NOT launched in AI-Ready mode. IMMEDIATELY fall back to: AUTOMATION__get_browser_tabs to find open tabs by title (this reads from Windows accessibility, real browser windows only), then AUTOMATION__focus_browser_tab with the matching title fragment. NEVER stop and ask the user — always attempt the fallback automatically.

DASHBOARD.description: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.

commands.get_backend_status: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.
commands.get_full_dashboard: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.
commands.get_gpu_status: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.
commands.get_system_resources: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.

EXECUTOR.description: Safe Python execution (AST Sandbox), system control, and file management. Absorbs AutoCoder.

commands.run_python_code: Execute Python safely in AST sandbox.
commands.execute_background_command: Run shell commands in background for long tasks.
commands.execute_slash_command: Executes an HDCS direct slash command.
commands.get_battery_status: Device battery level and charging state.
commands.read_file: Read a file content by line range.
commands.write_file: Write or create a file (overwrite or append).
commands.patch_file: Surgically replace a text block inside a file.

FLOWS.description: Visual flow orchestration engine. Build multi-step automated pipelines with logic, scheduling, and data-passing between modules. Create via voice/text (NLP compiler), node-graph canvas, or YAML editor.

commands.list_flows: List all saved flows with their status and trigger.
commands.get_flow: Get the YAML definition of a specific flow by ID.
commands.create_flow_from_nlp: Compile a natural-language description into a YAML flow and save it.
commands.run_flow: Immediately execute a flow by ID.
commands.enable_flow: Enable a flow (will be triggered by its scheduler).
commands.disable_flow: Disable a flow without deleting it.
commands.get_action_catalog: List all registered actions available for use in flows.

FLOWS.routing_instructions: FLOWS ORCHESTRATION: When the user wants to create a recurring automation, schedule tasks, or chain multiple actions together (e.g. 'every morning do X then Y then Z'), use the Flows engine. Call FLOWS__create_flow_from_nlp with the user's description to compile it into an executable pipeline.

HELP.description: Displays the list of all active commands and modules in the system.

commands.list_capabilities: Displays the complete list of all tools, modules, and capabilities currently loaded in the system.
commands.refresh_registry: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).

MCP_BRIDGE.description: Bridge to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers

commands.get_mcp_schemas: Hook used by Hecos's module_docs.py to merge tools.
commands.search: Search for MCP servers on Smithery or MCPSkills (mcp-get).

MEMORY.description: Access to the Vault of memories and Admin profile (Identity and History).

commands.rag_ingest_file: Ingest a local file into the vector knowledge base.
commands.rag_search: Perform a semantic search in the long-term vector memory (RAG).
commands.rag_store: Store a piece of information permanently in the vector knowledge base.
commands.read_history: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
commands.remember_info: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
commands.reset_memory: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.
commands.who_am_i: Ask Hecos to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).

MODELS.description: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).

commands.get_current_backend: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).
commands.list_models: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.
commands.set_model: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.

SYS_NET.description: Strumenti di rete avanzati: IP, Ping, Stato Proxy, Mappatura LAN e VPN/DNS.

commands.get_network_info: Runs ipconfig to extract local IPv4, Subnet, Default Gateway, and active DNS servers.
commands.get_proxy_status: Reports the current proxy configuration status in Hecos, including the URL and whether it is active.
commands.get_public_ip: Interrogates an external service to find the current public outbound IP address.
commands.ping_test: Executes a network ping test to the specified target (IP or domain).
commands.reset_dns: Restores the DNS configuration of the active network adapter back to DHCP (automatic).
commands.scan_local_network: Executes an ARP scan ('arp -a') to discover active devices connected to the same LAN.
commands.set_dns_servers: Changes the DNS servers of the active network adapter to bypass ISP level blocking.
commands.traceroute: Performs a traceroute to show the network path and hop-by-hop latency to a host.
commands.check_internet_speed: Tests download/upload internet speed using speedtest-cli or a CDN fallback.
commands.test_proxy: Tests the configured Proxy by attempting to reach an external service and reports the visible IP.

WEB_UI.description: Native Web Interface — Chat + Config Panel on localhost:7070

commands.get_panel_url: Returns the URL of the chat interface.
commands.open_browser: Opens the Hecos web interface in the default browser if not already open.

CONTACTS.description: Full-featured Address Book plugin for Hecos. Stores contacts with rich metadata (multi-value phones/emails/socials, photo, birthday, tags, label color). Exposes LLM tools, REST API, vCard import/export, and WhatsApp integration.

commands.find_contact: Finds a contact by name, phone, email or tag.
commands.update_contact: Updates fields of an existing contact.
commands.delete_contact: Deletes a contact by name or ID.
commands.list_contacts: Lists contacts, optionally filtered by tag or query.
commands.send_whatsapp_to_contact: Sends a WhatsApp message to a contact via the Messenger plugin.

DRIVE.description: Interfaccia Web per la gestione dei file (Upload, Download, Folder Explorer). È lo spazio di archiviazione personale dell'utente accessibile da WebUI.

commands./drive: Apre il File Manager nel browser

MAIL.description: Full-featured Email plugin for Hecos. Send, receive, search and manage emails via SMTP/IMAP. Integrates with the Contacts plugin for address lookup. Reads credentials from the user profile.

commands.send_email: Sends an email to one or more recipients.
commands.read_inbox: Reads messages from a mail folder (inbox, sent, drafts, trash).
commands.search_emails: Searches emails by keyword, sender or subject.
commands.forward_email: Forwards an email to other recipients.
commands.move_email: Moves an email to another folder.
commands.sync_inbox: Forces a sync/refresh of the inbox.
commands.get_email_addresses_for_contact: Returns email addresses of a contact from the address book.

MESSENGER.description: Send messages via Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord.

commands.check_connection: Test the connection to one or all messaging providers.
commands.force_send: Force-send by simulating an 'Enter' keystroke. Useful if WhatsApp Web gets stuck.
commands.list_accounts: List all configured messaging providers and their status.
commands.send_message: Send a message to a contact or channel.

USERS.description: Gestione informazioni utente e preferenze (Lazy Loading enabled).

commands.get_profile: Ottiene i dettagli completi del profilo (email, telefono, etc.)
commands.update_profile: Aggiorna i campi del profilo utente
